title: Refreshed Melodies
description: A resource pack that brings back forgotten C418 music, introduces new fitting songs, balances music priorities, removes biome-specific songs, and more!
body:
![Refreshed Melodies Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f1231e3a5b565da0966b1f338984a69f13be9c.png)
‎ 
### 🪄 This resourcepack is a feature-packed all-in-one solution that balances the Minecraft soundtrack. The main goal of this pack is to enhance your journey by promoting the classic C418 songs above all else, while at the same time, adding some new fitting content to be heard.
‎ 

**📜 Feature list:**
- Add unused/removed C418 music
- Remove biome-specific song limitations
- Play Creative exclusive music also in survival
- Add new rarely occurring songs to the main menu, overworld, nether, underwater, and end
- Balance song weights, so that the nostalgic and classic songs play more often compared to the newer songs
- Add a bunch of new fitting rarer cave sounds
- Backport songs from 1.21 (For 1.20.1 versions)

# 
‎ 

> 💖 Troughout the development of this resourcepack, I've kept it the highest priority to make sure every custom song feels natural and blends right into the usual Minecraft gameplay. All of the songs are calm and are in prefect harmony with the Minecraft immersion.

‎ 


<details>
<summary>Song weights</summary>

<details>
<summary>Information</summary>

- The songs of this pack are sorted into **C418/Vanilla/Custom** root folders. So it's easy to for example just remove all custom songs if you really want to ;)

</details>
